news.t: AI's growth is just getting started, BlackRock's thematic ETF head says

holdings.infoBox: ARTY is an equity ETF with a total of 65 individual holdings. The top holdings are Marvell Technology stock at 9.46%, Micron Technology at 7.96%, Advanced Micro Devices at 7.68%, SK hynix at 4.41%, and CoreWeave at 4.07%.

overview.description: The iShares Future AI & Tech ETF (ARTY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks a concentrated index of global companies that provide products and services that are expected to contribute to artificial intelligence technologies. Holdings are selected and weighted based on a modified market-cap. ARTY was launched on Jun 26, 2018 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: Morningstar Global Artificial Intelligence Select Index

data.title: 7 Best Robotics & AI ETFs
data.text: Artificial intelligence could define this decade. These seven AI ETFs provide investors with well-rounded exposure as this technology comes into its own.

data.title: 'Fast Money' traders talk the AI shakeup dragging Big Tech names and Nasdaq down
data.text: 'Fast Money' traders talk the impact of the DeepSeek's AI launch on the U.S. tech sector and the major indices.

data.title: AI's growth is just getting started, BlackRock's thematic ETF head says
data.text: BlackRock's Jay Jacobs expects infrastructure and cybersecurity plays to shine in 2025. He cites the artificial intelligence boom as a major catalyst.
